# disconnect()

**Instance Method**

Manually disconnects and closes the data channel.

## Declaration

```swift
func disconnect()
```

## Discussion

Sets the [doc://com.apple.FoveatedStreaming/documentation/FoveatedStreaming/FoveatedStreamingSession/MessageChannel/channelStatus-swift.property] to [doc://com.apple.FoveatedStreaming/documentation/FoveatedStreaming/FoveatedStreamingSession/MessageChannel/ChannelStatus-swift.enum/closed].
title: disconnect()
